title: FancyAnimated
body:
# FancyAnimated

![FancyAnimated](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21--1.21.11-green?style=for-the-badge)
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-blue?style=for-the-badge)
![Author](https://img.shields.io/badge/Author-darklegendxr-orange?style=for-the-badge)

![FancyAnimated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/437f09b69d5f51e6766bf46d5444e088c677e159.png)
A simple, lightweight, and premium hologram animation addon for **FancyHolograms**. Add life to your server with high-quality typewriter effects that support legacy colors, hex codes, and MiniMessage tags.

## ✨ Features

*   🎭 **Premium Typewriter Animation**: A smooth character-by-character animation that automatically pauses and clears.
*   🌈 **Full Style Support**: Works perfectly with:
    *   Legacy Colors (`&e`)
    *   Hex Colors (`<#RRGGBB>` / `&#RRGGBB`)
    *   MiniMessage Tags (`<bold>`, `<italic>`, etc.)
*   🌍 **Multi-Language Support**: Built-in support for English (`en`) and Spanish (`es`).
*   💾 **Persistent Animations**: Animations automatically reload and restart when the server reboots.
*   🛡️ **Edit Protection**: Automatically stops animations when a player uses `/hologram edit`, preventing the "partial text" bug.
*   🖱️ **User Friendly**: Uses 1-based indexing for hologram lines (matches exactly what you see).

## 🚀 Installation

1.  Ensure you have [FancyHolograms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fancyholograms) installed.
2.  Download `FancyAnimated-1.0.0.jar`.
3.  Place it in your server's `plugins/` folder.
4.  Restart your server.

## 📜 Commands

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/fa edit <hologram> setanimation <line> typewriter [speed]` | Start a typewriter animation on a specific line. |
| `/fa edit <hologram> removeanimation <line>` | Stop an animation and restore the original text. |
| `/fa reload` | Reload configuration files and restart animations. |
| `/fa help` | View the in-game help menu. |

## 🔑 Permissions

*   `fhanimate.admin` - Required to use all FancyAnimated commands.

## 🛠️ Configuration

The plugin uses clean, easy-to-read configuration files:
*   `config.yml`: Main settings (Language).
*   `messages_en.yml`: All English message strings.
*   `messages_es.yml`: All Spanish message strings.
*   `animations.yml`: Secure data store for active animations.

---
*❤️Made by darklegendxr*
